top_signals.title: Magners owner hits out at Reeves as hospitality crisis hits sales
top_signals.summary: The maker of Magners and Bulmers cider missed its profit and revenue targets this year, blaming Rachel Reeves’ Budget and the “financial stress” it caused pubs and bars. C&C Group, which also owns the Orchard Pig and Jubel brands, said it is seeing resilient demand for cider and beer but plummeting sales of high-alcohol drinks [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
